subtitle: QQQ signal, prior-data only, trade TQQQ at today's open.

buy: Equivalent to screenshot rule where RV7 < 0.03 and RV7 < 0.035 both appear: stricter RV7 < 0.03 governs.
sell: Sell / go CASH when both trigger conditions fail (SSLP20_2 >= -0.008 AND MOM150 <= -0.01), or RV5 >= 0.03, or RV7 >= 0.03, or SR63_126 >= 1.05.
definitions: SMA20[t] = average of QQQ Opens from t-1..t-20
RV5[t] = stdev of prior 5 open-to-open returns
RV7[t] = stdev of prior 7 open-to-open returns
SMA63[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-63
SMA126[t] = average QQQ Opens from t-1..t-126

plainEnglish: Stay invested when either the 20-day slope has dropped enough over the last 2 days OR 150-day momentum remains better than -1%.
Short-term open-to-open volatility must stay low (RV5 and RV7 caps).
The 63-day trend must not be too stretched above the 126-day trend.
All indicators use prior data (t-1 and earlier), and trades are modeled open-to-open in TQQQ.

indicators.label: SSLP20_2
indicators.description: 20-day SMA / same SMA from 2 trading days earlier - 1.

indicators.label: RV5
indicators.description: Std dev of prior 5 open-to-open returns.

indicators.label: RV7
indicators.description: Std dev of prior 7 open-to-open returns.
